title: Derrida-Retaux type models and related scaling limit theorems
summary: We give characterizations of the transition semigroup and generator of a continuous-time Derrida--Retaux type process that generalizes the one introduced by Hu, Mallein and Pain (Commun. Math. Phys., 2020). It is shown that the process arises naturally as the scaling limit of the discrete-time max-type recursive models introduced by Hu and Shi (J. Stat. Phys., 2018).
